title: opulaster cordatus
intro: Opulaster cordatus, also known as the narrow-leaved or European opulus, is a plant species belonging to the Elaeagnaceae family. Its bark and leaves have been traditionally used in medicine for their anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Opulaster cordatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe irritated skin, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
